summary: Video. A 'How It Started vs. How It's Going' clip built entirely from Fox News footage: a split-screen comparing VP Kamala Harris's 2021 Guatemala 'do not come' speech (labeled 'How it started... All Talk') with Sec. Noem speaking in front of caged detainees at El Salvador's CECOT prison, followed by two plain blue static text cards ('TODAY, WE'RE PUTTING CRIMINALS BEHIND BARS' / 'UNDER PRESIDENT TRUMP AND SECRETARY NOEM, DHS PUTS AMERICA FIRST'). The audio is the news anchors and officials talking, with no music track. It is repurposed cable-news footage with text cards.
notable_text: How it started...All Talk; FLASHBACK: VP HARRIS OFFERS WARNING TO MIGRANTS; NOEM: THIS FACILITY IS ONE OF THE TOOLS WE CAN USE; TODAY, WE'RE PUTTING CRIMINALS BEHIND BARS.; UNDER PRESIDENT TRUMP AND SECRETARY NOEM, DHS PUTS AMERICA FIRST.
